name: Peppers Healdsburg
tagline: Classic American breakfast, lunch, and dinner on Dry Creek Road — hearty plates, friendly service, open every day.
seoDescription: Peppers Healdsburg is a casual family restaurant at 200 Dry Creek Rd in Healdsburg, CA, serving classic American breakfast, brunch, burgers, and sandwiches daily from 7am to 9pm.

sections.heading: Classic diner comfort, from first coffee to last call
sections.subheading: Peppers Healdsburg serves big American breakfasts, fresh salads, juicy burgers, and a long list of sandwiches on Dry Creek Road — the kind of honest plate that comes to the table hot, every day of the week.
badges: On Dry Creek Road in Healdsburg

sections.heading: A Healdsburg table that just feels easy
body: Peppers is the unfussy, sit-down spot Healdsburg reaches for when it wants a real meal without the wine-country price tag — a classic diner where the eggs Benedict come out right, the hash browns are crisp, and the waffles are worth the drive.

It runs on the things that keep a neighborhood restaurant full: fast, friendly service, plates that arrive hot, and a menu wide enough that the whole table finds something. Regulars come for breakfast and end up back for a burger at dinner.
highlights: Breakfast and brunch served all day
Burgers, sandwiches, salads, and dinner plates

items.title: Breakfast & Brunch
items.description: Eggs Benedict, omelettes, and strawberry waffles, with crisp, well-seasoned hash browns — served all day.

items.title: Burgers & Sandwiches
items.description: Juicy burgers and a deep sandwich list, including the short-rib sandwich and chili cheese fries regulars rave about.

items.title: Fresh Salads
items.description: Big, fresh salads for a lighter midday plate or an easy side.

items.title: Dinner Plates
items.description: Hearty American dinners in a casual, come-as-you-are dining room.

items.title: Gluten-Free Options
items.description: A kitchen that can take care of gluten-free guests without making it a production.

items.title: To-Go & Delivery
items.description: The full menu packed up for takeout when you want it at home.

sections.heading: Why Healdsburg keeps a table here

items.title: Open every single day
items.body: Seven days a week, 7am to 9pm — breakfast through dinner.

items.title: Food comes out hot
items.body: Plating a cut above casual, and meals that reach the table fast and hot.

items.title: Something for everyone
items.body: A wide menu and gluten-free options, so the whole table is covered.

items.title: Right on Dry Creek Road
items.body: Easy to find and easy to park at the gateway to Dry Creek Valley.

items.quote: Good American food and friendly service — classic diner style, and the food comes to the table hot.
items.author: Yelp diner · Healdsburg

items.quote: The plating is a cut above what I’ve seen in other casual restaurants, and the staff were fast and accommodating.
items.author: Tripadvisor review

items.quote: Those strawberry waffles are absolutely to die for, and the eggs Benedict is the reason I keep coming back.
items.author: Healdsburg regular

sections.heading: Hungry in Healdsburg?
sections.body: Find Peppers at 200 Dry Creek Rd, open every day 7am–9pm. Call (707) 435-3333 for to-go orders.

sections.heading: Breakfast to dinner, all in one easy stop
sections.subheading: A full American menu in Healdsburg — morning eggs, midday burgers and salads, and hearty dinner plates, every day from 7am to 9pm.

items.q: Do you serve breakfast all day?
items.a: Yes — breakfast and brunch favorites are available throughout the day.
We do. Just let your server know and we will take care of you.
At 200 Dry Creek Rd in Healdsburg, the gateway to Dry Creek Valley.

sections.heading: The everyday diner on Dry Creek Road
sections.subheading: Peppers is Healdsburg’s honest, all-day American restaurant — hot plates, fair prices, and a friendly room that welcomes everyone.
